form.formComment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 431m at this track by 5 lengths in a Grade 5. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 431m at this track by 5 lengths in a Grade 5. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 25.19 in a one length win at this track over 431m. Strongly fancied and lived right up to expectations last start. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 25.19 in a one length win at this track over 431m. Strongly fancied and lived right up to expectations last start. Stick with her.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (25.27) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a one length second. Has two wins and four placings from nine starts from the draw. Looks a key chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (25.27) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a one length second. Has two wins and four placings from nine starts from the draw. Looks a key chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost momentum on the home turn.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 431m at this track. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 431m at this track. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at The Gardens over 400m in 22.96. Followed that up with a minor placing over 520m at Wentworth Park at Grade 5 six days ago. Has an exceptional 24.61 best time at this course and distance. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at The Gardens over 400m in 22.96. Followed that up with a minor placing over 520m at Wentworth Park at Grade 5 six days ago. Has an exceptional 24.61 best time at this course and distance. Worth including.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 4/5 on April 4 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Red Rock Razzle, beaten 10 lengths (30.31). Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 4/5 on April 4 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Red Rock Razzle, beaten 10 lengths (30.31). Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (25.55) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 9 lengths. Has two successes and four minors from 10 starts from box 7. Looks one of the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (25.55) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 9 lengths. Has two successes and four minors from 10 starts from box 7. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a one length third (25.27) over 431m at this track and making it two placings on end. Has been around the mark last couple and should make her presence felt.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a one length third (25.27) over 431m at this track and making it two placings on end. Has been around the mark last couple and should make her presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room at the start; Checked off heels rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 431m at this track. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 431m at this track. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered and carried wider rounding the turn into the back straight.
